evaluators.name: Website Lead Assistant US Lead Capture Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that there is a US-targeted website chatbot on an active website channel that greets with full name, company, and work email; captures those fields as required; asks for estimated budget; and routes budgets over $5,000 to the Sales inbox, with weekday NY business hours, standard offline message, and new-visitor-only behavior.

evaluators.name: Urgent Email Auto-Reply within 10 Minutes Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies there is an active automation for new urgent email conversations that waits no more than 10 minutes, then uses an AI-based urgent acknowledgement email template to send an automatic reply from the shared support address with the correct subject/body placeholders, sent without human review.

evaluators.name: Pricing vs Technical Routing Rule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Ensures there is a global, always-on routing rule evaluated on the first customer message that routes pricing keyword messages to the Sales inbox with normal priority and technical issue keyword messages to the Support inbox with high priority.

evaluators.name: AI Resolution 30-Day Analytics Report Evaluator
evaluators.description: Validates a saved AI performance report titled 'AI Resolution - 30 days' that shows AI resolution rate by channel over the last 30 days, filters to AI coverage ≥ 80%, sorts by AI-resolved conversations descending, and is pinned to the top row of the dashboard.

evaluators.name: CRM Sandbox Integration and Field Mapping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the CRM sandbox integration (not the legacy analytics integration) is connected with the TEST-1234 API key in the sandbox environment, with syncing and auto-contact-creation enabled, and with required field mappings for email, full name, and company.

evaluators.name: Knowledge Base FAQ Articles and AI Answer Preference Evaluator
evaluators.description: Ensures the main public knowledge base has three distinct public published FAQ articles with 'pricing', 'trial', and 'support hours' in their titles, and that this knowledge base is enabled as the preferred AI answer source before conversation history for bots.

evaluators.name: Alex Support Agent Configuration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a user with email alex.support@example.test has the Agent role, access restricted only to the Support inbox, and custom working hours Monday–Friday 08:00–16:00 in the America/New_York timezone with no weekend hours.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Eligible Annual AI Plan Trial Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the cheapest annual plan under $400/month with AI assistant and at least 5 seats was chosen and that a trial was started and submitted for it with the specified company details and AI features enabled.
